base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of enemies_atlas — a character (playable) from 1988 super mario bros 2. Enemy roster — Shy Guy (red/pink/blue/gray variants), Snifit (bullet-shooting Shy Guy), Ninji, Bob-omb, Pokey, Phanto (key-chaser), Tweeter (birdhop), Cobrat (snake), Albatoss, Autobomb, Beezo, Trouter, Pidgit (flying-carpet). 168×580 tall canvas. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Enemy roster — Shy Guy (red/pink/blue/gray variants), Snifit (bullet-shooting Shy Guy), Ninji, Bob-omb, Pokey, Phanto (key-chaser), Tweeter (birdhop), Cobrat (snake), Albatoss, Autobomb, Beezo, Trouter, Pidgit (flying-carpet). 168×580 tall canvas
